title: Harbour House Menu Cover
alt: Front cover of the physical Harbour House food and drink menu, showing illustrated sea creatures like a turtle, pineapple, octopus, and crab.
whyItWorks: Establishes the physical brand identity with organic, hand-drawn coastal illustrations and a clean typeface layout.

title: Mains & Tapas Menu Details
alt: Physical printed menu sheet showing mains such as Fish & Chips, Burgers, Sirloin Steaks, and Tapas selections.
whyItWorks: Shows the authentic culinary offerings and simple editorial styling used in the venue.

title: Cocktail & Mocktail Menu Details
alt: Physical printed menu listing extensive cocktail and mocktail lists, categorized with price details.
whyItWorks: Provides the baseline cocktail options and pricing guidelines for bar staff and promotion.

title: Draught Beer & Wine List Menu Details
alt: Physical printed menu listing draught beer, cider, and white, red, rosé, and sparkling wine selections.
whyItWorks: Defines the beverage guidelines and approved brands served at the venue.

title: Sundown Jazz Session Promotion
alt: Concept flyer for a Sundown Jazz session featuring live music, saxophonist illustration, and warm sunset background.
whyItWorks: Demonstrates the integration of live entertainment events with the signature sunset branding.

title: Seafood Platter Concept
alt: Beautifully styled seafood platter featuring oysters, lobster, and prawns arranged on ice with lemon slices.
whyItWorks: Highlights premium, local coastal ingredients under bright, clean natural daylight.

title: Golden Hour Sunset Cocktail
alt: A vibrant sunset cocktail garnished with citrus on a wooden table, overlooking yachts at Ryde Marina during sunset.
whyItWorks: Captures the essence of the sunset experience, connecting the drink directly to the location.

title: Harbour House Sunset Deck
alt: Real photograph of the Harbour House building facade, flagpoles, and guests socializing on the waterfront deck during sunset.
whyItWorks: Captures the authentic architecture, waterfront placement, and lively sunset guest atmosphere in a single real photo.

title: Find Harbour House Banner
alt: Find Harbour House social poster showing the building facade lit with warm fairy lights and boats moored at Ryde Marina.
whyItWorks: Combines brand typography, the logo, and a visual locator to direct guests to the venue.

title: Visual Identity System Concept
alt: Concept sheet detailing the primary logo, badge, typography families, and color swatches.
whyItWorks: Serves as the visual style sheet for all designers and marketing staff to reference.

title: Sharing Plates by the Marina
alt: A wooden tray with sourdough bread, dipping oils, tapas, and a fish bowl with yachts in the background.
whyItWorks: Shows a sociable guest experience, placing the viewer at the table looking out at the marina.

title: Harbour House Burger Promo
alt: Social graphic highlighting the 6oz burger with pancetta and chips on a rustic table.
whyItWorks: Features comfort food options in a casual yet premium styling.

title: Cocktails by the Sea Banner
alt: Five distinct cocktails lined up on wooden boards on the quay wall with boats in the background during golden hour.
whyItWorks: Promotes the extensive drink menu in a premium, social seafront atmosphere.

title: Night Dining & Evening Vibe
alt: Evening concept of the Harbour House decking with glowing lights and groups dining under a deep navy night sky.
whyItWorks: Demonstrates the transition of the venue from daytime casual to evening intimate dining.

title: Moules marinière Platter Concept
alt: A steaming pot of Moules marinière served with toasted sourdough bread on a wooden deck table.
whyItWorks: Showcases the iconic local mussels dish in a coastal setting.

title: Moules marinière Outdoor Dining Concept
alt: An alternative view of the mussels pot served outdoor overlooking boats.
whyItWorks: Reiterates the fresh seafood offering directly connected to the sea.

title: Desktop Website Revamp
alt: Proposed desktop redesign of the Harbour House public website
whyItWorks: Demonstrates the premium modern coastal aesthetic and enhanced commercial calls-to-action on desktop devices.

title: Mobile Website Revamp
alt: Proposed mobile redesign of the Harbour House public website
whyItWorks: Demonstrates a responsive, touch-friendly viewport design that prioritizes key mobile user interactions.
